title: [SystemC] Add interop.verilated operation
body: This operation instantiates a hw module that is or will be verilated and allows to generate the necessary interoperability layer to talk to the verilated module in various contexts, i.e., in a SystemC module, a Verilog module, inside a CIRCT based simulator, etc. Having a separate instance operation avoids transformations performed on the regular hw instance such as inlining, etc. and allows to add more attributes to specify the configuration under which the instantiated module was verilated.
